info.english_meaning: to split to divide to separate to partition to burn to fry
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM na dfSyate  mADavIyaDAtuvfttO 4.114 vyuza~ (viBAge) ityatra 'kecit amum ozWyAdim dantyantam icCanti' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH nirdizwaH asti
